info.description: Intelligent, secure contract management powered by Docusign.

401.description: Unauthorized. Ensure a valid access token is provided and that the connector is properly authenticated with DocuSign.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred on the DocuSign MCP server. Please try again later or contact DocuSign support if the issue persists.

post.description: Invoke Docusign MCP Server with a streamable response
